LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DELLA CASTILLO'S MOTION, TO DEEM REQUESTS ADMITTED, AND FOR SANCTIONS. PLAINTIFF DELLA LINDA CASTILLO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS THE ABOVE TEXT VERBATIM AND EMAIL IT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG PRIOR TO THE TIME SET FOR HEARING. PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED PRIOR TO THE HEARING IS REJECTED: NOT VERBATIM. PLAINTIFF TO RESUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2025 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion, And Motion, To Deem Requests Admitted, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DELLA CASTILLO's Motion, To Deem Requests Admitted, And For Sanctions.

Plaintiff Della Linda Castillo's unopposed Motion To Deem Requests Admitted And For Sanctions is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

Plaintiff is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Proposed order submitted prior to the hearing is rejected: not verbatim. Plaintiff to resubmit a proposed order.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
